title.en: China-to-Grenada Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入格林纳达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入格瑞那達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Grenada GDBS standards context, PURC and GRENLEC grid-connection review, IEC 62109 safety evidence, IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence, IEC 61000 and IEC 62920 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, hurricane and salt-mist derating, and St George's sea-freight documentation — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与格林纳达GDBS标准背景、PURC及GRENLEC并网审查、IEC 62109安全证据、IEC 62116和IEC 61727并网接口证据、IEC 61000及IEC 62920 EMC证据、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数、飓风和盐雾降额以及圣乔治海运文件——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與格瑞那達GDBS標準背景、PURC及GRENLEC併網審查、IEC 62109安全證據、IEC 62116和IEC 61727併網介面證據、IEC 61000及IEC 62920 EMC證據、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數、颶風和鹽霧降額以及聖喬治海運文件——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, GDBS standards determination, PURC approval, GRENLEC grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Grenada Bureau of Standards requirements, Public Utilities Regulatory Commission rules, GRENLEC interconnection procedures, applicable OECS/CARICOM standards context, hurricane and marine-environment project specifications, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、GDBS标准适用裁定、PURC批准、GRENLEC并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行格林纳达标准局要求、公共事业监管委员会规则、GRENLEC接入程序、适用OECS/CARICOM标准背景、飓风和海洋环境项目规格及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、GDBS標準適用裁定、PURC批准、GRENLEC併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行格瑞那達標準局要求、公共事業監管委員會規則、GRENLEC接入程序、適用OECS/CARICOM標準背景、颶風和海洋環境項目規格及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Grenada, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirming the current GDBS, PURC, and GRENLEC approval path for the project; (2) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence; (3) IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence; (4) IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series EMC evidence; (5) firmware validation against Grenada's 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V grid, which shares frequency with China but differs in nominal voltage from China's 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V baseline; and (6) environmental derating for hurricane exposure, heat, humidity, and salt-mist coastal service. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence is useful as background but is not automatically accepted for Grenada grid connection.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口格林纳达时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认项目当前适用的GDBS、PURC和GRENLEC审批路径；（2）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（3）IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727并网接口证据；（4）IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列EMC证据；（5）针对格林纳达50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V电网进行固件验证，该市场与中国频率相同，但标称电压不同于中国50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V基准；（6）针对飓风、热湿和沿海盐雾环境的降额。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964证据可作为背景资料，但不会自动被接受为格林纳达并网依据。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口格瑞那達時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認項目當前適用的GDBS、PURC和GRENLEC審批路徑；（2）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（3）IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727併網介面證據；（4）IEC 62920及IEC 61000系列EMC證據；（5）針對格瑞那達50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V電網進行韌體驗證，該市場與中國頻率相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V基準；（6）針對颶風、熱濕和沿海鹽霧環境的降額。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964證據可作為背景資料，但不會自動被接受為格瑞那達併網依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
